channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania's Capital Markets Drive Economic Growth Through DSE Expansion
item.description: Tanzania's capital markets are experiencing significant growth as the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE) records historic trading volumes and market capitalisation, indicating a shift in how the count...

item.title: Elbit Systems Proposes Converting Commercial Ships into Drone Carriers
item.description: Elbit Systems has unveiled a concept to convert standard commercial merchant ships into modular drone carriers capable of launching and retrieving its Hermes 650 Spark fixed-wing unmanned aircraft. Th...

item.title: Flash floods in J&K's Budgam cause extensive damage, rescue operations ongoing
item.description: Heavy rains in Jammu and Kashmir's Budgam district triggered massive flash floods, sweeping away a man and causing significant damage to markets and residential areas. Rescue operations are underway w...

item.title: Senator Marcoleta Not Guilty on Plunder and PD 46 Charges
item.description: Senator Rodante Marcoleta entered a not guilty plea to plunder and violation of Presidential Decree 46 (PD 46) charges filed against him by the Sandiganbayan Third Division. The case stems from a P75-...

item.title: Nigeria's Payroll System Faces Corruption Challenges
item.description: The article discusses how Nigeria's Integrated Personnel and Payroll Information System (IPPIS), designed to eliminate ghost workers and improve transparency, was exploited in a major payroll manipula...

item.title: Cultural Heritage and Community Bonds in Indian South African Society
item.description: The article explores the rich cultural tapestry of Indian South African communities, highlighting cherished traditions like the McIver shirt, bioscope gatherings, and communal practices. It emphasizes...

item.title: Shabaz Ali's Critique of Billionaires and Wealth Inequality
item.description: Shabaz Ali, a TikTok influencer known as @ShabazSays, has gained fame for his satirical take on the wealthy elite, particularly those who flaunt their privilege online. His viral videos mocking 'desig...

item.title: Harper Beckham Launches Beauty Brand After Trademark Denial in America
item.description: Harper Beckham, the 15-year-old daughter of David and Victoria Beckham, is set to launch her own skincare brand, Harlo by Harper, following a trademark dispute in the United States. The brand's name w...

item.title: Tanzanian Government Invests 9.085 Billion Shillings in Moshi Road Infrastructure
item.description: The Tanzanian government has allocated 9.085 billion shillings to develop road infrastructure in Moshi District during the 2026/27 financial year. This investment aims to strengthen transport networks...

item.title: Jackie Ogaga Tributes Elvis Otieno 'Beast' for His Influence and Family Losses
item.description: Content creator Jackie Ogaga has shared a heartfelt tribute to her late childhood friend Elvis Otieno, known as Beast, highlighting his significant role in her life and the recent tragic family losses...

item.title: Police Confrontation at Westview Plaza Involves Conducted Energy Weapons and Firearms
item.description: A police incident at North Vancouver's Westview Plaza resulted in the closure of the shopping plaza and a chaotic confrontation between officers and a suspect. Witnesses reported hearing multiple poli...

item.title: Ed Miliband's Foreign Secretary Appointment Sparks White House Concern
item.description: Ed Miliband's recent appointment as Foreign Secretary under the leadership of new Prime Minister Andy Burnham has triggered significant concern within the White House. President Donald Trump's adminis...

item.title: Cristo Fernandez makes USL Championship debut after Ted Lasso role

item.title: Supreme Court asks Sonam Raghuvanshi to choose between surrendering or defending her bail in Raja Raghuvanshi murder case
item.description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday asked Sonam Raghuvanshi, an accused in the alleged murder of her husband Raja Raghuvanshi during their honeymoon trip to Meghalaya in May 2025, to decide whether she would...

item.title: Wallabies Lock Josh Canham Makes History with Historic Hat-Trick Against Italy
item.description: Josh Canham, the Wallabies' lock forward, has made history by becoming the first player in the team's history to score three tries in a single rugby union match. The achievement occurred during a cruc...

item.title: News Corp Australia addresses crawler bot access issues
item.description: The article discusses a technical message from News Corp Australia regarding restrictions on crawler bot traffic. The company uses software to manage bot activity on its websites. If users encounter t...

item.title: Melvin Matibag's Testimony in Alleged Threats Case
item.description: Melvin Matibag, identified as the prosecution's final witness in a legal case involving alleged threats, is under scrutiny for his role in the proceedings. The case, which has drawn significant attent...

item.title: Tanzania Invests in Mobile Medical Camps to Improve Healthcare Access
item.description: The Tanzanian government has allocated 95 million shillings to enhance mobile medical camps, aiming to improve healthcare access in remote areas. This funding will support operational costs like medic...

item.title: Lagos compensates 331 property owners for road projects with ₦3.1bn
item.description: Lagos State has paid ₦3.1 billion in compensation to 331 property owners whose land and buildings were acquired for infrastructure projects across Badagry, Epe, Ikorodu, Igbogbo, and Ogba. The governo...

item.title: Tragedy as flood takes two brothers in Katsina; community calls for improved drainage
item.description: Two young brothers, Muhammad Salisu (12) and Abdurrahman Salisu (7), were tragically swept away by floodwaters in Janbago, Katsina State, while returning home from school. The incident occurred during...
